model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age ** 2) + C(sex) + unemp + lfpr + driverslicenses + everify", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": sample["statefip"]})
sample_selection: Restrict to ethnically Mexican respondents born in Mexico (hispan == 1 and bpl == 200).
Restrict to noncitizens or status-not-reported cases (citizen in {3, 4, 5}).
Restrict to ages 18-45 with positive person weights and valid usual hours (0-98).
Restrict to plausible childhood arrivals with yrimmig <= 2007 and 0 <= yrimmig - birthyr <= 15.
